notes: Primary OCR Markdown states the model comparison, data, parameter descriptions, priors, shock categories, and selected money-channel coefficient references.
The detailed model equations are said to be in the Online Appendix, which is not present in the MinerU Markdown and has no local appendix normalization file.
Reduced-form equations were drafted with explicit needs_review markers where they depend on the MMB implementation cross-check.
The Taylor-rule money term differs between source prose and the implementation cross-check comment state and needs human review.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
